text: Hi, so this is another video where I am going to discuss about cloud AI. So today is the first time that I'm using it. The model that I'm currently using is Sonnet 3.5. However, it goes up to Opus 4.1. And the interesting part of this is that it is going like cloud is currently giving much more better facility than chat GPT to be honest. Though chat GPT is much more, let's say diversified, but cloud GPT is much more focused and nuanced in short. Thank you.
